title: Chief Communications Officer
summary: The communications leader responsible for narrative standards, public statements, crisis response, channel discipline, and message governance.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Communications Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The communications leader responsible for narrative standards, public statements, crisis response, channel discipline, and message governance.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan’s public language clear, truthful, coordinated, and strong across institutional moments and communication channels.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
